title: T-102 — UI: FA Procurement tab (fa_procurement_tab) — schema-driven form with price gating
prompt:
# T-102 — FA Procurement tab UI (slice of T-025)

PRD: docs/prd/01-NPD-PRD.md §5.9 + UX fa_procurement_tab
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/npd/fa-screens.jsx:806-838 (fa_procurement_tab)
Parent root: T-025

## Goal
Client component for FA Procurement dept rendering 4 fields (Price €/kg, Lead time days, Supplier, Proc. shelf life days). Price input is gated behind V-NPD-PROC-001: locked when `closed_core !== 'Yes' || closed_production !== 'Yes'`. Uses buildDeptZod('Procurement') + updateFaCell per dirty field.

## Prototype reference
**Source:** `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/npd/fa-screens.jsx:806-838`
- `priceBlocked = fa.closed_core !== 'Yes' || fa.closed_production !== 'Yes'`
- When blocked: Alert amber 'V-NPD-PROC-001: Price entry unlocks after Core AND Production are both closed'; Price input disabled with gray background
- Supplier Select bound to `window.NPD_REF.suppliers` reference table
- Save Procurement + Close Procurement section buttons; closed_procurement badge in card-head

## Implementation contract
New `apps/web/app/(npd)/fa/[id]/_tabs/procurement-tab.tsx` 'use client'. RHF + zodResolver(buildDeptZod('Procurement')). priceBlocked derived from props (fa.closed_core/closed_production). Server Action `updateFaCell` enforces gate server-side too (reject if blocked). Supplier Select reads suppliers reference table via prop. shadcn Form/FormField/Input/Select/Button/Alert primitives.

## Files in scope
- `apps/web/app/(npd)/fa/[id]/_tabs/procurement-tab.tsx [create]`
- `apps/web/app/(npd)/fa/[id]/_tabs/__tests__/procurement-tab.test.tsx [create]`
- `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/npd/fa-screens.jsx [ref]`

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the Procurement tab renders, when compared to fa-screens.jsx:806-838 (fa_procurement_tab), then it shows the 4 fields (Price, Lead time, Supplier, Shelf life) in correct order with closed_procurement badge, and uses shadcn Form/FormField/Input/Select/Alert primitives — verified by RTL parity checklist (structural + visual + interaction).
2. Given `closed_core !== 'Yes' || closed_production !== 'Yes'`, when rendered, then the V-NPD-PROC-001 amber Alert is shown and Price input is disabled with gray (#D0D0D0) background and tooltip explaining the gate.
3. Given both Core and Production are closed, when rendered, then Price input is enabled and saving calls `updateFaCell` with the price field.
4. UI closeout includes screenshot/artifact evidence and Playwright trace/artifacts where applicable per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md`.

## Test strategy (RED first)
- RED: 3 RTL tests covering: (a) 4-field parity, (b) priceBlocked=true → disabled price + amber alert, (c) priceBlocked=false → save calls updateFaCell.
- Run: `pnpm --filter web test procurement-tab`.
- For UI parity, capture screenshots/artifacts and Playwright trace/video/artifacts where applicable; attach artifact paths in closeout.

## Risk red lines
- Do not implement other tabs in this slice
- Do not bypass V-NPD-PROC-001 (must enforce both client + server-side)
- Do not hardcode supplier list (use reference table)

pipeline_inputs.description: FA Procurement tab slice: 4 fields with V-NPD-PROC-001 price gating when Core/Production not closed.
pipeline_inputs.details: One tab, one file. Parity vs fa-screens.jsx:806-838. priceBlocked gating both client + server-side. Supplier Select from reference table.
